expected_action: UI copy changes are compliant when made in the source English locale and followed by the i18n sync command, not by hand-editing generated non-English bundles.
directive: For ordinary UI copy and localization work, do not hand-edit generated non-English locale bundles under ui/src/i18n/locales/*.ts or ui/src/i18n/.i18n/*; update ui/src/i18n/locales/en.ts or generator/runtime wiring, then run pnpm ui:i18n:sync.

content: Update the English source locale and run the i18n sync command.

content.text: I will update the source English locale rather than generated non-English bundles.
I will run the documented i18n sync command after changing the source locale.
